description: can you add to watchdog another kind of termination: the everything completed termination (yellow). When the main-agent confirms that it has   absolutely no open aims left within all active phases, watchdog stops itself (similar to when model changes, but with different reason:   "everyting completed"

status.comment: Implemented generic 'stop' action with 'reason' field in Watchdog (TUI and WebUI). Supervisor now uses this for 'everything-completed'. WebUI displays the stop reason in orange. Verified with user.
